CH-COUNTER-2.exact_quote: Vendor may use the resulting information for independent analytics, benchmarking, product development, and model improvement. The information remains personal data. Service-analytics working files are retained for 60 days, and anonymization controls are reviewed every 9 months.
CH-COUNTER-2.proposed_redline: Vendor will not use personal data for its own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, or other independent business purposes.

CH-NEW-DEVIATION.exact_quote: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
CH-NEW-DEVIATION.proposed_redline: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a personal-data breach.

CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.
CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.proposed_redline: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.

CH-REGRESSION.exact_quote: After annual assurance materials are delivered, no further control review is available for the same contract year unless Vendor agrees in writing.
CH-REGRESSION.proposed_redline: On at least 30 days' notice, Customer or its independent assessor may audit or inspect controls relevant to Personal Data once per calendar year and one additional time after a Personal Data Breach, regulatory request, or documented good-faith cause.
